indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: Couch is too large and too close to the window, making it difficult to use as a bed.

indicators.name: bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are too close to the window, making it difficult to use them as a bed.

indicators.name: bar counter
indicators.rationale: Bar counter is too close to the window, making it difficult to use it as a bed.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow light to enter the room, which can be disruptive to sleep.

indicators.name: bright lighting
indicators.rationale: Bright lighting can be disruptive to sleep.

reasoning_summary: The scene is not well-suited for sleep (primary). The presence of a couch, bar stools, and a bar counter makes it difficult to use the space as a bed. Large windows and bright lighting make it difficult to achieve a dark, quiet environment necessary for sleep.
